	{"bbox_2d": [114, 497, 203, 508], "text_content": "- = Base on spec"},

	{"bbox_2d": [114, 620, 283, 631], "text_content": "5R6, 56R, 560R, 5K6, 56K, 22M."},

	{"bbox_2d": [519, 323, 907, 351], "text_content": "The ordering code of a RC0805 chip resistor, value 56 Ω with ±1% tolerance, supplied in 7-inch tape reel is: RC0805FR-0756RL."},
